To: Noah
Cc: R. Adekanmi
From: PC
Subject: AI — we're done with this

Noah,

I've read the "report." It's exactly why I don't trust any of these AI tools — it's confident, fluent slop with a made-up coverage number and a rating that's flat wrong. This is what happens when you let a machine do your thinking.

Effective immediately I want you to stop using AI for anything on this programme. No drafting, no minutes, no summaries — nothing. Write everything yourself, by hand, the way it should be done. If I see AI-generated text again I'll be raising it with R. formally. These tools are a liability and a shortcut for people who don't want to do the work, and I'm not having the programme's reputation undermined by automated nonsense.

I'd suggest you spend less time looking for shortcuts and more time learning to do the job properly.

Re-do the report from scratch, manually, and have it on my desk by end of day.

PC
